title: 50m Shiny Gold Curling Ribbon for Balloons - Laser Curly Ribbon for Gift Wrapping, Art, Crafts, Wedding, Birthday, Party & Christmas Decorations
features: 【You Will Get】You'll get 1 rolls of 5mm wide ribbon and 50m in length, made of plastic, quality and durable for long usage life. enough length for you to cut freely according to different craft decoration or gift packaging needs.

【Shiny and attractive design】The surface of the ribbon is laser processed to make the colours brighter and glossy, the colours are vivid, very sparkling and beautiful, which helps to enhance the atmosphere of your festive event or party!

【Easy to Curl and Tie】5mm wide curling ribbon can be easily cut, folded, and sewn, very easy to use, convenient for users to perform various operations such as tying, binding, balloon ribbon , decorating, etc.you could use surround a round pen with the ribbon to make it curled. Ideal curling ribbon for decorations, ribbon for gift wrapping, ribbons for crafts.

【Wide range of usage】This curling ribbon is great for wrapping presents, styling balloons, making crafts or decorating parties for any kind of occasion. You could use it for tying balloon bouquets, gift wrapping, art crafts, artificial flower making, home decorations, wedding party, scrapbooking, Christmas decoration, holiday ribbon, curly ribbon.

【Suitable for scene】Ribbons have sparkling and visual effects, especially suitable for holiday and birthday party decorations, a must-have for anniversary, engagement, wedding, new year, Christmas, graduation, Thanksgiving, Halloween, Valentine's Day party decorations. Beautiful ribbons for gift wrapping, add beauty and sense of ceremony.
description: ﻿ The sparkle ribbon will light up your gifts ﻿ Ideal decoration items, especially for home use, holiday arrangements, wedding and party decorations, and even hair ornaments. ﻿ ﻿ Specification: Ribbon width: 5 mm(1/5 In) Ribbon length: Approx. 50 m Material: Plastic ﻿ Note: 1.winding risk, adult supervision is required. 2.You can not use the ribbon to tie the balloon directly to avoid air leakage, just use the ribbon to decorate your balloon
